summary: D16: deploy/README.md — incident-response playbook from §9.3 (Cloudflare outage DNS flip, VPS rebuild, secret rotation, Ollama restart)
description:
Incident-response playbook from §9.3. Run-at-3am doc covering:
- Cloudflare outage → DNS flip to direct origin
- VPS rebuild (Debian 13 trixie on Hetzner CX22 — see D14 bootstrap for the canonical setup)
- Secret rotation

ADDITION (per B6c, commit todo:77272cb5): Ollama incident response —
restart (systemctl restart ollama), re-pull model (ollama pull nomic-embed-text:v1.5),
verify port (curl 127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags). guru-web depends on Ollama for query
embeddings; if Ollama is down, /api/query will return EmbedError.

resolution.note: deploy/README.md written. Quick-reference table + sections for incidents (502, 520, Ollama, Postgres, CF down) + routines (VPS rebuild, restore from backup, secret rotation) + lessons-learned section capturing gotchas hit during first deploy. ~200 lines, no concrete secrets so safe in public repo.
